sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46942" key="h)luga/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠλῠγ-άζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἦλυξ</etym>) <sense id="n46942.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">overshadow</tr_>, only in compd. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπηλ-</foreign> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
